name: 书签主页 Bookmarks as New Tab
description: 将书签转换为新标签页的导航风格主页。Convert your bookmarks into a navigation-style homepage for your new tabs.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src * 'unsafe-inline'; img-src * 'self' data: https:; connect-src https://translate.googleapis.com https://www.google.com;
